title: PE32 1JT, ECD Poultry Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/KP3829LN/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: ECD Poultry Limited Installation name: Abbey Field Farm Poultry Unit Permit number: EPR/KP3829LN/A001  "
